ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data record */,
  "unix_time" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the data record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Open price of the instrument at the start of the timeframe */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the timeframe */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the timeframe */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Close price of the instrument at the end of the timeframe */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of trades during the timeframe */,
  "timeframe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timeframe of the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the data record */,
  "volume_weighted_avg_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the timeframe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_timeframe_id FOREIGN KEY ("timeframe_id") REFERENCES timeframes ("timeframe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., cryptocurrency, stock, commodity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the instrument */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the instrument */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the instrument details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeframes" (
  "timeframe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeframe */,
  "timeframe_name" TEXT /* Name of the timeframe (e.g., 1 minute, 5 minutes, 1 day) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the timeframe (e.g., 60 seconds, 300 seconds, 86400 seconds) */,
  "interval_seconds" INTEGER /* Interval in seconds */,
  "interval_minutes" INTEGER /* Interval in minutes */,
  "interval_hours" INTEGER /* Interval in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeframe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data record accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)
